heading: Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability Fund
label: 2012 Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability Fund
text: The Director shall maintain the fund in the Treasury known as the “Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability Fund” (hereinafter in this chapter referred to as the “fund”), originally created pursuant to title II of the Central Intelligence Agency Retirement Act of 1964 for Certain Employees.
notes: References in TextThe Central Intelligence Agency Retirement Act of 1964 for Certain Employees, referred to in text, is , , , which was formerly set out as a note under . was revised generally by , , , and is now known as the Central Intelligence Agency Retirement Act. As so revised, title II of is classified generally to this subchapter.Pub. L. 88–64378 Stat. 1043section 403 of this titlePub. L. 88–643Pub. L. 102–496, title VIII, § 802106 Stat. 3196Pub.
